zh.lifeSummary: Maximilian Kihm於1637年出生在德國薩阿藍德薩阿普法爾-可萊斯布利艾斯卡斯特爾比爾巴賀。他於大約1668年與Gertrud HENSEL結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1715年4月29日在德國薩阿藍德薩阿普法爾-可萊斯布利艾斯卡斯特爾阿爾史賀巴賀享年78歲，埋葬在德國薩阿藍德薩阿普法爾-可萊斯布利艾斯卡斯特爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Maximilian Kihm于1637年出生在德国薩阿藍德薩阿普法爾-可萊斯布利艾斯卡斯特爾比爾巴賀。他于大约1668年与Gertrud HENSEL结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1715年4月29日在德国薩阿藍德薩阿普法爾-可萊斯布利艾斯卡斯特爾阿爾史賀巴賀享年78岁，埋葬在德国薩阿藍德薩阿普法爾-可萊斯布利艾斯卡斯特爾。

nameMeanings.name: Kihm
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Swiss German: probably a variant of Kiem, an Alemannic variant of Keim . This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine).

variants.name: Keim
meanings: Jewish (Ashkenazic): from the Yiddish personal name Kayem. This is a protective name, given to a sickly child, based on the Hebrew adjective qayom ‘tough, enduring’.
German (Bavaria, Baden-Württemberg): from Middle High German kīme ‘sprout, shoot, offspring’, sometimes used as a personal name, or from a pet form of Joachim . See also Kaim .

nameMeanings.name: Maximilian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin name Maximilianus (a diminutive of Maximus ). This was borne by a 3rd-century saint numbered among the ‘Fourteen Holy Helpers’. Although already existing, the name was reanalysed in the 15th century by the Emperor Friedrich III , who bestowed it on his first-born son ( 1459–1519 ), as a blend of the names Maximus and Aemilianus, intending thereby to pay homage to the two classical Roman generals Q. Fabius Maximus ‘Cunctator’ and P. Cornelius Scipio Aemilianus . The name became traditional in the Habsburg family in Austria-Hungary and also in the royal house of Bavaria. It was borne by an ill-fated Austrian archduke ( 1832–67 ) who was set up as emperor of Mexico but later overthrown and shot.

variants.name: Maximillian
meanings: From the Latin name Maximilianus (a diminutive of Maximus ). This was borne by a 3rd-century saint numbered among the ‘Fourteen Holy Helpers’. Although already existing, the name was reanalysed in the 15th century by the Emperor Friedrich III , who bestowed it on his first-born son ( 1459–1519 ), as a blend of the names Maximus and Aemilianus, intending thereby to pay homage to the two classical Roman generals Q. Fabius Maximus ‘Cunctator’ and P. Cornelius Scipio Aemilianus . The name became traditional in the Habsburg family in Austria-Hungary and also in the royal house of Bavaria. It was borne by an ill-fated Austrian archduke ( 1832–67 ) who was set up as emperor of Mexico but later overthrown and shot.

en.lifeSummary: Maximilian Kihm was born in 1637, in Bierbach, Blieskastel, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Germany. He married Gertrud HENSEL about 1668. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 29 April 1715, in Alschbach, Blieskastel, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Germany, at the age of 78, and was buried in Blieskastel, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Maximilian Kihm est né en 1637, à Bierbach, Blieskastel, Saarpfalz-Kreis, La Sarre, Allemagne. Il a épousé Gertrud HENSEL environ 1668. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 29 avril 1715, à Alschbach, Blieskastel, Saarpfalz-Kreis, La Sarre, Allemagne, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à Blieskastel, Saarpfalz-Kreis, La Sarre, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Maximilian Kihm wurde 1637 in Bierbach, Blieskastel, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Deutschland geboren. Er hat um 1668 Gertrud HENSEL geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 29. April 1715 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Alschbach, Blieskastel, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Deutschland und wurde in Blieskastel, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Maximilian Kihm è nato il nel 1637 nel Bierbach, Blieskastel, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Germania. Lui sposato Gertrud HENSEL circa 1668. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 29 aprile 1715, nel Alschbach, Blieskastel, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Germania, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolto a Blieskastel, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Maximilian Kihmは1637年にドイツサアルランドサアルプファルズ-クレイスブリースカステルビエルバチで生まれた。約1668年にGertrud HENSELと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1715年4月29日にドイツサアルランドサアルプファルズ-クレイスブリースカステルアルスチバチで78歳で死去し，ドイツサアルランドサアルプファルズ-クレイスブリースカステルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Maximilian Kihm(은)는 1637년 독일 사알랜드 사아르p팔즈-크레이스 블리스카스텔 비르바치에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1668년 Gertrud HENSEL(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1715년 4월 29일 독일 사알랜드 사아르p팔즈-크레이스 블리스카스텔 알슈바치에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 사알랜드 사아르p팔즈-크레이스 블리스카스텔에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Maximilian Kihm nasceu em 1637, em Bierbach, Blieskastel, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Alemanha. Ele casou-se com Gertrud HENSEL aproximadamente 1668. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 29 de abril de 1715, em Alschbach, Blieskastel, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Alemanha, com 78 anos, e foi sepultado em Blieskastel, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Maximilian Kihm родился в 1637 г. в местности биирбач, блиескастел, саарпфалз-крис, саарланд, Германия. Он женился на женщине по имени Gertrud HENSEL около 1668 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 29 апреля 1715 г. в местности алщбач, блиескастел, саарпфалз-крис, саарланд, Германия в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности блиескастел, саарпфалз-крис, саарланд, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Maximilian Kihm nació en 1637, en Bierbach, Blieskastel, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Alemania. Se casó con Gertrud HENSEL aproximadamente 1668. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 29 de abril de 1715, en Alschbach, Blieskastel, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Alemania, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultado en Blieskastel, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Alemania.
